description: A v0.2.0 Class B artifact transitioning from INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE to SUPPORTED, where a new affirming source raises the artifact above threshold with no contradicting record, MUST receive SUPPORTED status. The transition MUST declare prior_status, transition_reason, and prior_artifact_hash.

input.claim: this execution occurred with the declared observed result

observations.result: log truncated before exit code recorded

transition_reason.narrative: RFC 3161 timestamp receipt arrived after initial sealing; affirms claim and crosses threshold without contradicting prior partial log.

why: SPEC_LOCK_v0.2.0 §2.6.1 row 1: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE → SUPPORTED is allowed when new affirming evidence reaches threshold with no contradiction. Exercises B5 (prior_status + transition_reason declared), B6 (allowed pair), B7 (prior_artifact_hash present).
